event3.text: This place should be centuries old.

event5.text: It looks like someone left yesterday.

event0.title: RECOVERED MEMORY
event0.content:
Subject: UNKNOWN
Status: PARTIALLY RECOVERED

Door Opened
Override Accepted
Signal Lost
Casualty Reported

event3.text: That wasn't part of the scan.

event2.text: The system thinks someone inside this structure matches an archived identity.

event3.text: But that identity should be impossible.

event0.text: There's another chamber behind this door.

event1.text: And I think whatever AEON is...

event4.text: I don't think this structure was built to keep people out.

event5.text: I think it was built to keep something in.
